asset_category_descriptions.indices_macro: Macro-linked index and ETF proxies with slower, cleaner tape.
asset_category_descriptions.mag7: The big US platform leaders where catalyst reactions matter most.
asset_category_descriptions.semis_memory: Chip, storage, and memory names that often move together on AI demand.
asset_category_descriptions.neoclouds: GPU-cloud and AI infrastructure names tied to compute demand.
asset_category_descriptions.ai_infra: AI infrastructure names where cloud commitments and capex cycles can drive re-rates.
asset_category_descriptions.crypto_equities: Public market crypto beta, brokers, exchanges, and treasury-linked stocks.
asset_category_descriptions.asia_macro: Asia-linked equity, index, and currency proxies for regional risk appetite.
asset_category_descriptions.latam_macro: LatAm beta is mainly about local rates, commodities, FX, and global risk appetite.
asset_category_descriptions.commodities_metals: Metals and hard-asset proxies with macro and supply-chain sensitivity.
asset_category_descriptions.energy: Oil, gas, and energy equity proxies where inventory and geopolitical catalysts matter.
asset_category_descriptions.agriculture: Agricultural contracts with cleaner macro and weather-driven trend behavior.
asset_category_descriptions.fx_rates: Currency and dollar-index proxies that can anchor macro risk direction.
asset_category_descriptions.uranium: Uranium spot and miner exposure with policy, supply, and nuclear-demand catalysts.
asset_category_descriptions.volatility: Volatility instruments for stress, hedging, and regime-change reads.
asset_category_descriptions.consumer: Consumer and discretionary names where spending trends drive tape.
asset_category_descriptions.financials: Financials and private-market exposure with rate and liquidity sensitivity.
asset_category_descriptions.biotech_glp1: Healthcare and GLP-1-linked growth where product catalysts matter.
asset_category_descriptions.meme_momentum: High-reflexivity tickers where flow, attention, and positioning dominate.
asset_category_descriptions.growth: Single-name growth setups outside the big platform and chip baskets.
asset_category_descriptions.software: Software longs need durable growth, margin leverage, and AI monetization proof.
asset_category_descriptions.other_stocks: Everything executable that does not fit the main desks yet.

summary.label: All closed trades
summary.top_lesson: Lean into exit take profit: 100% WR, $+137.54.

lessons: Lean into exit take profit: 100% WR, $+137.54.
Avoid exit scalp failed followthrough: 0% WR, $-13.75.

findings.evidence: 920 closed trades show 42.8% win rate vs 70% target.
findings.fix: Require every new entry/exit policy to show replay or live cohort improvement before increasing size.
findings.title: Win-rate target is not being controlled by a promotion gate

findings.evidence: Median hold is 61m and 50% of closed trades lasted under 60m.
findings.fix: Build an exit-policy replay by thesis class; require hard invalidation for thesis runners and delay soft conviction exits.
findings.title: The system is churning positions before theses can work

findings.evidence: Invalidation-style exits are 88% of closes; take-profit exits are 3%.
findings.fix: Separate scalp exits from high-timeframe exits and learn per-family stop width, time stop, and runner rules.
findings.title: Most exits are invalidation exits, not planned winners

findings.evidence: Recent sample has 3779 directional ideas; 92% blocked and 0.4% executed.
findings.fix: Add per-guard counterfactual attribution: which blocks saved losses, which blocks missed winners, and which should be relaxed.
findings.title: The guard stack blocks most directional ideas without ranking missed winners

findings.evidence: 100% of directional decisions had no usable social/trader-feed coverage.
findings.fix: Wire reliable public trader feeds or paid social/attention feeds, then treat missing attention as unknown rather than neutral.
findings.title: The meme/attention layer is effectively missing on recent decisions

findings.evidence: 58% of recent directional ideas had no catalyst/news context and no social coverage.
findings.fix: Make the morning scout book the source of truth for what deserves risk that day; demote out-of-radar names to observation.
findings.title: Too many directional ideas have neither catalyst nor attention context

findings.evidence: 29% of sampled directional ideas were price-heavy without enough fundamental/attention score.
findings.fix: Keep the first-principles guard on, but measure the blocked cohort so we know if it improves precision.
findings.title: Price-action-only ideas still appear in the directional stream

findings.evidence: Decision log is 4421MB; full reads can stall the agent/dashboard.
findings.fix: Add daily rollups and archive old JSONL shards; dashboards should read compact reports, not the raw firehose.
findings.title: Decision history is too large for fast analysis

findings.evidence: Worst family: HYPE:LONG with 7 samples and $-40.29 PnL.
findings.fix: Tie family-level edge to max size, allowed direction, and cooldown before fresh exposure is admitted.
findings.title: Capital is not yet aggressively avoiding the worst families

roadmap.build: Replay current exits against alternatives by thesis class: scalp, event starter, high-timeframe runner.
roadmap.name: Exit policy replay
roadmap.why: Win rate is being hurt by churn and invalidation exits.

roadmap.build: Track per-guard saved-loss and missed-win rates, then auto-relax or tighten thresholds by evidence.
roadmap.name: Guard counterfactual attribution
roadmap.why: Blocked ideas need labels so the agent knows which guards help vs miss winners.

roadmap.build: Add approved trader/social/volume feeds and an attention-unknown state that reduces confidence.
roadmap.name: Attention feed coverage
roadmap.why: Fundamentals plus meme/attention flow is a core edge, but missing feeds currently look neutral.

roadmap.build: Set per-family max size, leverage, cooldown, and starter eligibility from realized edge.
roadmap.name: Family allocator
roadmap.why: Some ticker-direction families clearly pay while others bleed.

roadmap.build: Persist compact daily summaries and archive old JSONL shards.
roadmap.name: Daily policy rollup
roadmap.why: The raw decision log is too large to reason about directly.

summary.headline: Win-rate target is not being controlled by a promotion gate
